docker-engine.name: Docker Engine
docker-engine.description: Motor de contenedores necesario para instalar apps. Se instalará en el pool que elijas.

jellyfin.name: Jellyfin
jellyfin.description: Servidor multimedia gratuito y open source. Alternativa a Plex.
jellyfin.compose:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:latest
    container_name: jellyfin
    ports:
      - '8096:8096'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/cache:/cache
    environment:
      - JELLYFIN_PublishedServerUrl=${HOST_IP}
    restart: unless-stopped

plex.name: Plex
plex.description: Servidor multimedia con apps para todas las plataformas.
plex.compose:
services:
  plex:
    image: plexinc/pms-docker:latest
    container_name: plex
    ports:
      - '32400:32400'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/transcode:/transcode
    environment:
      - PLEX_CLAIM=${PLEX_CLAIM}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

emby.name: Emby
emby.compose:
services:
  emby:
    image: emby/embyserver:latest
    container_name: emby
    ports:
      - '8920:8096'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

navidrome.name: Navidrome
navidrome.description: Servidor de música compatible con Subsonic/Airsonic.
navidrome.compose:
services:
  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:latest
    container_name: navidrome
    ports:
      - '4533:4533'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
      - ${MUSIC_PATH}:/music:ro
    environment:
      - ND_SCANSCHEDULE=1h
      - ND_LOGLEVEL=info
    restart: unless-stopped

nextcloud.name: Nextcloud
nextcloud.description: Tu propia nube privada. Archivos, calendario, contactos.
nextcloud.compose:
services:
  nextcloud:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    container_name: nextcloud
    ports:
      - '8080:80'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/html:/var/www/html
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/var/www/html/data
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

syncthing.name: Syncthing
syncthing.description: Sincronización de archivos P2P, sin servidor central.
syncthing.compose:
services:
  syncthing:
    image: syncthing/syncthing:latest
    container_name: syncthing
    hostname: nimbusos
    ports:
      - '8384:8384'
      - '22000:22000/tcp'
      - '22000:22000/udp'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}:/var/syncthing
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
    restart: unless-stopped

immich.name: Immich
immich.description: Gestión de fotos y vídeos con IA. Alternativa a Google Photos.
immich.compose:
name: immich
services:
  immich-server:
    container_name: immich_server
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-server:${IMMICH_VERSION:-release}
    volumes:
      - ${UPLOAD_LOCATION}:/usr/src/app/upload
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    env_file:
      - .env
    ports:
      - '2283:2283'
    depends_on:
      - redis
      - database
    restart: always
    healthcheck:
      disable: false

  immich-machine-learning:
    container_name: immich_machine_learning
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-machine-learning:${IMMICH_VERSION:-release}
    volumes:
      - model-cache:/cache
    env_file:
      - .env
    restart: always
    healthcheck:
      disable: false

  redis:
    container_name: immich_redis
    image: docker.io/valkey/valkey:8-bookworm
    healthcheck:
      test: redis-cli ping || exit 1
    restart: always

  database:
    container_name: immich_postgres
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/postgres:14-vectorchord0.4.3-pgvectors0.2.0
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USERNAME}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_DATABASE_NAME}
      POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: '--data-checksums'
      DB_STORAGE_TYPE: 'HDD'
    volumes:
      - ${DB_DATA_LOCATION}:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    shm_size: 128mb
    restart: always

volumes:
  model-cache:

transmission.name: Transmission
transmission.description: Cliente BitTorrent ligero con interfaz web.
transmission.compose:
services:
  transmission:
    image: linuxserver/transmission:latest
    container_name: transmission
    ports:
      - '9091:9091'
      - '51413:51413'
      - '51413:51413/udp'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

qbittorrent.name: qBittorrent
qbittorrent.description: Cliente BitTorrent potente con muchas opciones.
qbittorrent.compose:
services:
  qbittorrent:
    image: linuxserver/qbittorrent:latest
    container_name: qbittorrent
    ports:
      - '8081:8081'
      - '6881:6881'
      - '6881:6881/udp'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - WEBUI_PORT=8081
    restart: unless-stopped

sonarr.name: Sonarr
sonarr.description: Gestión automática de series de TV.
sonarr.compose:
services:
  sonarr:
    image: linuxserver/sonarr:latest
    container_name: sonarr
    ports:
      - '8989:8989'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${MEDIA_PATH}/tv:/tv
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

radarr.name: Radarr
radarr.compose:
services:
  radarr:
    image: linuxserver/radarr:latest
    container_name: radarr
    ports:
      - '7878:7878'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${MEDIA_PATH}/movies:/movies
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

prowlarr.name: Prowlarr
prowlarr.compose:
services:
  prowlarr:
    image: linuxserver/prowlarr:latest
    container_name: prowlarr
    ports:
      - '9696:9696'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

homeassistant.name: Home Assistant
homeassistant.description: Automatización del hogar. Controla todos tus dispositivos IoT.
homeassistant.compose:
services:
  homeassistant:
    image: homeassistant/home-assistant:latest
    container_name: homeassistant
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

pihole.name: Pi-hole
pihole.description: Bloqueo de publicidad a nivel de red DNS. Elige tu contraseña al instalar.
pihole.compose:
services:
  pihole:
    image: pihole/pihole:latest
    container_name: pihole
    ports:
      - '53:53/tcp'
      - '53:53/udp'
      - '8088:80'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/etc-pihole:/etc/pihole
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/etc-dnsmasq.d:/etc/dnsmasq.d
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - FTLCONF_webserver_api_password=${WEBPASSWORD}
      - FTLCONF_dns_listeningMode=all
    restart: unless-stopped

adguard.name: AdGuard Home
adguard.description: Bloqueo de publicidad y tracking DNS.
adguard.compose:
services:
  adguard:
    image: adguard/adguardhome:latest
    container_name: adguard
    ports:
      - '53:53/tcp'
      - '53:53/udp'
      - '3000:3000'
      - '8083:80'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
    restart: unless-stopped

nginx-proxy.name: Nginx Proxy Manager
nginx-proxy.description: Gestor de proxy inverso con interfaz web. Primer acceso: admin@example.com / changeme (cámbialo al entrar).
nginx-proxy.compose:
services:
  nginx-proxy:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    container_name: nginx-proxy
    ports:
      - '80:80'
      - '81:81'
      - '443:443'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
    restart: unless-stopped

gitea.name: Gitea
gitea.description: Servidor Git auto-hospedado, ligero y rápido.
gitea.compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    container_name: gitea
    ports:
      - '3000:3000'
      - '2222:22'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
      - /etc/timezone:/etc/timezone:ro
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    environment:
      - USER_UID=${USER_UID}
      - USER_GID=${USER_GID}
    restart: unless-stopped

codeserver.name: VS Code Server
codeserver.description: Visual Studio Code en el navegador. Elige tu contraseña al instalar.
codeserver.compose:
services:
  codeserver:
    image: linuxserver/code-server:latest
    container_name: codeserver
    ports:
      - '${CODE_PORT}:8443'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${PROJECTS_PATH}:/projects
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - PASSWORD=${PASSWORD}
    restart: unless-stopped

portainer.name: Portainer
portainer.description: Gestión visual de Docker y contenedores.
portainer.compose:
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    container_name: portainer
    ports:
      - '9000:9000'
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

vaultwarden.name: Vaultwarden
vaultwarden.description: Gestor de contraseñas compatible con Bitwarden.
vaultwarden.compose:
services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    container_name: vaultwarden
    ports:
      - '8082:80'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
    environment:
      - WEBSOCKET_ENABLED=true
    restart: unless-stopped

grafana.name: Grafana
grafana.description: Dashboards y visualización de métricas. Elige tu contraseña al instalar (usuario: admin).
grafana.compose:
services:
  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    container_name: grafana
    ports:
      - '3001:3000'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/var/lib/grafana
    environment:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=${ADMIN_USER}
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD}
    restart: unless-stopped

prometheus.name: Prometheus
prometheus.compose:
services:
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    container_name: prometheus
    ports:
      - '9090:9090'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/etc/prometheus
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/prometheus
    restart: unless-stopped

uptime-kuma.name: Uptime Kuma
uptime-kuma.description: Monitor de uptime con interfaz moderna.
uptime-kuma.compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:latest
    container_name: uptime-kuma
    ports:
      - '3002:3001'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/app/data
    restart: unless-stopped

matrix-synapse.name: Matrix
matrix-synapse.description: Servidor Matrix self-hosted (Synapse). Tu propio servidor de chat cifrado. Conéctalo desde Element u otro cliente Matrix usando la URL que te da NimOS.
matrix-synapse.compose:
name: matrix-synapse
services:
  synapse:
    image: ghcr.io/element-hq/synapse:latest
    container_name: matrix_synapse
    ports:
      - '8008:8008'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/synapse:/data
    environment:
      - SYNAPSE_SERVER_NAME=${SERVER_NAME}
      - SYNAPSE_REPORT_STATS=no
      - UID=${UID}
      - GID=${GID}
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - 'if [ ! -f /data/homeserver.yaml ]; then /start.py generate; fi; exec /start.py'
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-fSs", "http://localhost:8008/health"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 5s
    restart: unless-stopped

element.name: Element
element.description: Cliente de chat Matrix. Conéctalo a tu servidor Synapse propio (pega la URL de tu Matrix Server) o usa servidores públicos como matrix.org.
element.compose:
name: element
services:
  element:
    image: vectorim/element-web:latest
    container_name: element_web
    ports:
      - '8086:80'
    restart: unless-stopped

ketesa.name: Ketesa
ketesa.description: Panel web de administración para Matrix (sucesor de Synapse Admin). Crea y gestiona usuarios, tokens de registro, salas y más, desde la web sin terminal. Entra con tu usuario admin de Matrix. Requiere Synapse v1.150.0+. (El primer admin debe crearse aparte; Ketesa gestiona del segundo en adelante.)
ketesa.compose:
name: ketesa
services:
  ketesa:
    image: ghcr.io/etkecc/ketesa:latest
    container_name: ketesa
    ports:
      - '8087:8080'
    environment:
      - SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
    restart: unless-stopped

handbrake.name: HandBrake
handbrake.description: Convierte y comprime vídeos. Mete los archivos en la carpeta 'storage' de la app y los convertidos saldrán en 'output'. Elige tu contraseña al instalar.
handbrake.compose:
services:
  handbrake:
    image: jlesage/handbrake:latest
    container_name: handbrake
    ports:
      - '5817:5800'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/storage:/storage
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/watch:/watch
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/output:/output
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - VNC_PASSWORD=${VNC_PASSWORD}
      - KEEP_APP_RUNNING=1
    restart: unless-stopped

n8n.name: n8n
n8n.description: Automatización de flujos de trabajo sin código. Conecta apps y automatiza tareas. Al abrirla por primera vez, crea tu cuenta de administrador.
n8n.compose:
services:
  n8n:
    image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:latest
    container_name: n8n
    ports:
      - '5678:5678'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/home/node/.n8n
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - GENERIC_TIMEZONE=${TZ}
      - N8N_SECURE_COOKIE=false
    restart: unless-stopped

minecraft-java.name: Minecraft Java Server
minecraft-java.description: Servidor de Minecraft Java Edition (para PC). Conéctate con el cliente de Minecraft a la IP del NAS, puerto 25565. Debes aceptar el EULA al instalar.
minecraft-java.compose:
services:
  minecraft:
    image: itzg/minecraft-server:latest
    container_name: minecraft-java
    tty: true
    stdin_open: true
    ports:
      - '${MC_PORT}:25565'
      - '127.0.0.1:25575:25575'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - EULA=${EULA}
      - MEMORY=${MEMORY}
      - ENABLE_RCON=true
      - RCON_PASSWORD=${RCON_PASSWORD}
      - TYPE=VANILLA
      - VERSION=LATEST
    restart: unless-stopped

metube.name: MeTube
metube.description: Descargador de vídeo web (yt-dlp) para YouTube y cientos de sitios. Pega la URL y descarga al NAS.
metube.compose:
services:
  metube:
    image: ghcr.io/alexta69/metube:latest
    container_name: metube
    ports:
      - '8081:8081'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - UID=${UID}
      - GID=${GID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - STATE_DIR=/config/.metube
    restart: unless-stopped

pinchflat.name: Pinchflat
pinchflat.description: Archivador de canales y playlists de YouTube (yt-dlp). Librería compatible con Jellyfin/Plex/Kodi.
pinchflat.compose:
services:
  pinchflat:
    image: ghcr.io/kieraneglin/pinchflat:latest
    container_name: pinchflat
    ports:
      - '8945:8945'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

kiwix.name: Kiwix
kiwix.description: Servidor de contenido offline (.zim): Wikipedia, Stack Exchange, Gutenberg, DevDocs… Arranca con una mini-Wikipedia de demo; añade tus .zim en la carpeta 'data' y reinicia.
kiwix.compose:
services:
  kiwix:
    image: ghcr.io/kiwix/kiwix-serve:latest
    container_name: kiwix
    entrypoint: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
    command:
      - "if ! ls /data/*.zim >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Kiwix: sembrando ZIM demo (primer arranque)...'; wget -O /data/demo.zim.part 'https://download.kiwix.org/zim/wikipedia/wikipedia_en_100_mini_2026-04.zim' && mv /data/demo.zim.part /data/demo.zim || rm -f /data/demo.zim.part; fi; exec /usr/local/bin/kiwix-serve --port=8080 /data/*.zim"
    ports:
      - '8080:8080'
    volumes:
      - ${KIWIX_DATA_PATH}:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

grocy.name: Grocy
grocy.description: ERP para tu hogar: inventario y despensa con caducidades, listas de compra, recetas y tareas. Grocy trae un usuario por defecto (admin/admin) que debes cambiar nada más entrar (menú de usuario).
grocy.compose:
services:
  grocy:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/grocy:latest
    container_name: grocy
    ports:
      - '9283:80'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

mealie.name: Mealie
mealie.description: Gestor de recetas y planificador de menús con listas de compra. Importa recetas desde URL. Eliges tu email y contraseña de admin al instalar.

tileserver.name: TileServer GL
tileserver.description: Servidor de mapas OpenStreetMap offline (vector). Arranca con un mapa-mundi de muestra; añade tu .mbtiles regional a la carpeta data y reinicia para tu zona.
tileserver.compose:
services:
  tileserver:
    image: maptiler/tileserver-gl-light:latest
    container_name: tileserver
    ports:
      - '8080:8080'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

lidarr.name: Lidarr
lidarr.description: Gestión automática de música (el *arr de tu colección musical).
lidarr.compose:
services:
  lidarr:
    image: linuxserver/lidarr:latest
    container_name: lidarr
    ports:
      - '8686:8686'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
      - ${MEDIA_PATH}/music:/music
      - ${DOWNLOADS_PATH}:/downloads
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped

jackett.name: Jackett
jackett.description: Proxy de indexadores (Torznab/Newznab). Alternativa clásica a Prowlarr para apps que solo soportan la API de Jackett.
jackett.compose:
services:
  jackett:
    image: linuxserver/jackett:latest
    container_name: jackett
    ports:
      - '9117:9117'
    volumes:
      - ${CONFIG_PATH}/config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - TZ=${TZ}
    restart: unless-stopped
